figures.caption: TABLE III: Accuracy of the generated AVVP pseudo-labels on the test set. The best results are bolded.

TABLE I: Comparison with state-of-the-art methods. The visual features are extracted by ResNet-152 [58] + 3D ResNet [59], and the audio features are extracted by VGGish [60]. The best results are bolded, while the second-best results are underlined.

TABLE II: Comparison with state-of-the-art methods. The visual features are extracted by CLIP [14], and the audio features are extracted by CLAP [15]. The best results are bolded, while the second-best results are underlined.
